entity.summary: Berachain-native decentralized exchange and liquidity hub using a Uniswap V3-style concentrated-liquidity AMM together with automated Sticky Vault and AutoWin liquidity-management products.
entity.notes: HEI models WinnieSwap's V3 AMM, swaps, liquidity positions, Sticky Vaults, AutoWin Vaults, and Berachain Proof-of-Liquidity integrations as one exchange entity. The related Winnie wallet and Henlo Winnie products are not separate exchange entities.

evidence.title: WinnieSwap introduction
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies WinnieSwap as a Berachain-native decentralized exchange and documents its Uniswap V3-style AMM, swaps, concentrated-liquidity positions, Sticky Vaults, AutoWin Vaults, and fee structure.

evidence.title: WinnieSwap protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current Berachain TVL, swap fees, and DEX volume for WinnieSwap, corroborating active exchange operation.
